translations.en: Caretaker
translations.zh: 守藏者

translations.en: an old, winged gargoyle. An odd device crafted of glass and metal rests upon his face.
translations.zh: 年邁之有翼魔像，臉上架著一具以玻璃與金屬製成的奇特裝置。

translations.en: The gargoyle ignores you and continues writing.
translations.zh: 魔像無視你，繼續書寫。

translations.en: "Yes? To inquire about the reason for
translations.zh: 「什麼事？欲問此番

translations.en: yet another
translations.zh: 又一次

translations.en: this
translations.zh: 此番

translations.en: interruption."
translations.zh: 打擾之緣由？」

translations.en: "To suppose that you are making a joke."
translations.zh: 「以為汝在說笑。」

translations.en: "To know as well as you that you took the Codex to your side of the world!"
translations.zh: 「汝亦知之，汝等已將守則之書帶往人類那一側的世界！」

translations.en: "To not be a signpost!"
translations.zh: 「吾非路牌！」

translations.en: "To find the Temple of Singularity in the mountains to the north - if you can @fly!"
translations.zh: 「獨身者神殿在北方山中——前提是汝能@fly飛翔！」

translations.en: "To be unable to reach the mountain-locked Temple of Singularity on foot."
translations.zh: 「徒步無法抵達深鎖於山中的獨身者神殿。」

translations.en: "To only be able to reach that holy place if you are a winged gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「唯有翼魔像方能抵達該聖地。」

translations.en: "To find this most fitting and proper."
translations.zh: 「吾認為此乃最為適切之安排。」

translations.en: "To see no reason to let human riff-raff into the Temple."
translations.zh: 「吾不見任何理由讓人類烏合之眾進入神殿。」

translations.en: "To find what you seek in the @Vortex Chamber."
translations.zh: 「汝所求之物在@Vortex渦旋之室。」

translations.en: "To find what you seek in the @Librum Chamber."
translations.zh: 「汝所求之物在@Librum典籍之室。」

translations.en: "To regret that that item is lost, stolen by human thieves years ago."
translations.zh: 「可嘆此物已失，多年前遭人類竊賊盜走。」

translations.en: "To have heard the humans mention the name @Stonegate as they fled."
translations.zh: 「曾聞逃走的人類提及@Stonegate石門之名。」

translations.en: "To have heard them say they would sail through Lost Hope Bay."
translations.zh: 「曾聞其言將乘船穿越絕望灣。」

translations.en: "To know nothing more about its whereabouts."
translations.zh: 「對其下落，吾一無所知。」

translations.en: "To admit ignorance regarding the location of the moonstones."
translations.zh: 「對月光石之所在，吾坦承不知。」

translations.en: "To suspect it to be someplace in the human-filled Underworld."
translations.zh: 「吾料其在充滿人類的幽冥界某處。」

translations.en: "To be called the Caretaker, in lieu of a name."
translations.zh: 「吾以守藏者之稱代替真名。」

translations.en: "To be honored by being allowed to perform my @duties as caretaker of this @Hall."
translations.zh: 「能在此@Hall殿中盡守藏@duties職責，深感榮幸。」

translations.en: "To care for my race's artifacts that rest here in the @Hall of Knowledge."
translations.zh: 「守護吾族典藏於@Hall智識之殿的珍寶文物。」

translations.en: "To keep the treasured artifacts of our race here in this Hall, in the three @chambers."
translations.zh: 「將吾族珍貴文物置於此殿三@chambers廳室之中。」

translations.en: "To have three rooms here:"
translations.zh: 「此殿共有三室：」

translations.en: "To keep artifacts from the @Underworld in the Human Chamber, to the east."
translations.zh: 「東側人類之室存放來自@Underworld幽冥界的文物。」

translations.en: "To keep valuable books in the Librum Chamber, to the west."
translations.zh: 「西側典籍之室存放珍貴典籍。」

translations.en: "And to keep the @Cube and the @Lens in the Vortex Chamber, to the south."
translations.zh: 「南側渦旋之室存放@Cube渦旋立方體與@Lens渦旋透鏡。」

translations.en: "Yes, the Underworld. To believe you know it as 'Britannia.'"
translations.zh: 「是的，幽冥界。吾料汝等稱之為『不列顛尼亞』。」
translations.note: gargoyle 視角：不列顛尼亞=幽冥界

translations.en: Without another word, the gargoyle returns to his work.
translations.zh: 魔像一言不發，繼續低頭工作。

translations.en: "To lack any time for idle chatter."
translations.zh: 「吾無暇閒聊。」

translations.en: "To desire you to get to the point and then depart."
translations.zh: 「請直說正事，然後離去。」

translator_notes: 守藏者為學究型老魔像，不耐煩人類打擾，語氣傲慢簡短。魔像To+動詞語法一律譯為文言。其視角中不列顛尼亞=幽冥界，此為魔像族世界觀重要設定。
